documentation.file_docstring: Settings Store integration for hot-reloading Tlon plugin config. Settings are stored in Urbit's %settings agent under: desk: "moltbot" bucket: "tlon" This allows config changes via poke from any Landscape client without requiring a gateway restart.
inline_comments: Parse channelRules - handles both JSON string and object formats. Settings-store doesn't support nested objects, so we store as JSON string.
If it's a string, try to parse as JSON
If it's already an object, use directly
Parse settings from the raw Urbit settings-store response. The response shape is: { [bucket]: { [key]: value } }
Parse pendingApprovals - handles both JSON string and array formats. Settings-store stores complex objects as JSON strings.
If it's a string, try to parse as JSON
Validate it's an array
Filter to valid PendingApproval objects
Parse a single settings entry update event.
Handle put-entry events
Handle del-entry events
Apply a single settings update to the current state.
Create a settings store subscription manager. Usage: const settings = createSettingsManager(api, logger); await settings.load(); settings.subscribe((newSettings) => { ... });
Get current settings (may be empty if not loaded yet).
Whether initial settings have been loaded.
Load initial settings via scry.
Response shape: { all: { [desk]: { [bucket]: { [key]: value } } } }
Settings desk may not exist yet - that's fine, use defaults
Subscribe to settings changes.
Register a listener for settings changes.
